summary: The average time to respond to historical photo requests fell to 2 days in fiscal 2024 thanks to streamlined processing procedures, then more than doubled in fiscal 2025 after DORIS temporarily reassigned a staffer from the vital-record and photo unit to cover a vacancy elsewhere. It kept rising into fiscal 2026, which DORIS attributes to a roughly 30% jump in the volume of photo requests received rather than a return of the earlier staffing issue.

sources.label: DORIS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
